MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

An Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney for failure to file the Petition For Final Distribution and Status Report. The return date is December 17, 2008 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204.
